faqs.question: Are your cockroach treatments safe for families and pets in Oceanside homes?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and modern application methods that are safe for children and pets when applied by our trained professionals. We'll provide you with specific instructions for any necessary precautions during and after treatment to ensure your family's safety.

faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in Oceanside, NY?
faqs.answer: Oceanside properties commonly face German cockroaches in kitchens and bathrooms, American cockroaches in basements and crawl spaces, and Oriental cockroaches in damp areas. Our technicians are experienced in identifying and eliminating all cockroach species found in Long Island's coastal communities with targeted treatment strategies.
